terms.source: Build practical AI skills for work
terms.target: Praktische KI-Kompetenzen für die Arbeit aufbauen
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.

terms.source: Learn the fundamentals of AI, large language models, and ChatGPT through hands-on practice.
terms.target: Lernen Sie die Grundlagen von KI, großen Sprachmodellen und ChatGPT durch praktische Übungen.
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.

terms.source: This course is designed for people who are new to AI or want a stronger foundation for using AI effectively at work.
terms.target: Dieser Kurs richtet sich an Personen, die neu in KI sind oder eine stärkere Grundlage für den wirksamen Einsatz von KI bei der Arbeit wünschen.
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.

terms.target: Es sind keine technischen Vorkenntnisse erforderlich.
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.

terms.source: Developed with the teams building OpenAI's models and products
terms.target: Entwickelt mit den Teams, die die Modelle und Produkte von OpenAI entwickeln
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.

terms.source: Practice deciding what to delegate to AI while staying in control of the final work.
terms.target: Üben Sie zu entscheiden, was Sie an KI delegieren, während Sie die Kontrolle über die endgültige Arbeit behalten.
terms.note: AI-drafted term rendering from OpenAI Academy and OpenAI developer documentation; pending X translation cross-check and community review.
